Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reopen Proceedings For Limited Purpose And For Order Approving Distribution Of Remaining Funds To Approved Claimants
Off Calendar Sep-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Deputy Attorney General, Karen W. Yiu of the California Department of Justice (510-622-2131) appears as counsel for petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER INS COMMISSIONER-STATE OF CA'S Motion To Reopen Proceedings For Limited Purpose And For Order Approving Distribution Of Remaining Funds To Approved Claimants is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
